metadata.description: Delegate reasoning, code review, and research to Google Gemini from Claude Code & Codex via the Antigravity CLI (agy), billed to your Google AI Pro subscription.

plugins.name: imagine
plugins.description: Four skills — gemini-pro (delegation + model selection), gemini-review (adversarial code/diff/plan review), gemini-research (large-context research), gemini-proxy (route your next N prompts through Gemini to be rewritten into detailed agent prompts) — that route work to Google Gemini on your AI Pro subscription. Works in Claude Code and Codex.
